# Document with links and images

This is a paragraph with a [hyperlink to somewhere](https://example.com/path?q=1) embedded in it. The renderer should display the label text, drop the URL.

Here is an image: ![Alt text describing the image](https://example.com/image.png "Optional title")

Reference-style links: this [some link][1] uses a reference.

[1]: https://example.com/reference

Last paragraph for spacing.
